name: Shenzhen New Land Tool Planning & Architectural Design Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen New Land Tool Planning & Architectural Design Co., Ltd. engages in urban construction activities in China. Its services include urban planning, architectural design, municipal design, transportation planning, low-carbon urban construction planning, landscape architecture design, land preparation and comprehensive development consulting services. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
